name: Ketamine
description: Anestetiiki dissociative na-enye analgesia, ịhịa aka n'ahụ, na amnesia ka ị na-echekwa ntụgharị ikuku na nkwụsi ike hemodynamic. Ihe mgbakasị ahụ ahọpụtara na TCCC - na-akwado BP n'adịghị ka opioids. A na-ejikwa ya maka ịhịa aka n'ahụ na RSI.
indications: Nlekọta mgbu na-agafeghị oke na nke siri ike
Usoro ịhịa aka n'ahụ (ịkwakọba ọnya, mbelata mgbaji)
Onye nnọchi anya nnabata maka RSI
dose: Analgesia: 0.1-0.3 mg / kg IV / IO (ngwa ngwa ngwa ngwa) | 0.5 mg / kg IM. Usoro nchịkwa usoro: 1-2 mg / kg IV | 4-6 mg/kg IM. Ntinye RSI: 1-2 mg/kg IV.
contraindications: A maara schizophrenia ma ọ bụ psychosis na-arụ ọrụ
ICP dị elu na-enweghị nchebe ụgbọ elu (ndị ikwu)
warnings: Mmeghachi omume mberede (delirium/hallucinations) -- belata site na midazolam 1-2mg IV ma ọ bụrụ na ọ dị.
Na-abawanye ihe nzuzo -- nwee njikere iri ahụ.
Laryngospasm dị ụkọ mana enwere ike --dobe BVM dị.

pediatric.dose: Analgesia: 0.5 mg / kg IV. Usoro nchịkwa usoro: 1-2 mg / kg IV | 4-5 mg / kg IM.
pediatric.note: A mụrụ nke ọma na pediatrics. Mmasị maka usoro mgbu.

obstetric.note: Ọ dị mma maka analgesia nke nne na obere doses. Enwere ike ịkpata ịda mbà n'obi iku ume nwa ọhụrụ na oke doses ma ọ bụrụ na ewepụta ya nso oge ọmụmụ.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / TCCC Guidelines
